name: Decadent Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces Dark baking chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter in a large mixing bowl until smooth.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
4. Dissolve baking soda in buttermilk and stir well.
5. Alternately add flour to the creamed mixture, beginning and ending with flour.
6. Fold in 1 cup mini-morsels, melted chocolate, chocolate syrup, and vanilla until just combined.
7. Do not overbeat.
8. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch Bundt pan.
9. Bake at 300°F for 1 hour and 25 to 35 minutes or until the cake springs back when touched.
10. Invert the cake immediately onto a serving plate and let cool completely.
11. Combine chopped white chocolate and shortening in a double boiler; heat until melted and smooth.
12. Remove from heat and drizzle over the cooled cake.
13. Melt remaining mini-morsels and shortening in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring until smooth.
14. Let cool before drizzling over the white chocolate.
15. Garnish with chocolate and white chocolate leaves if desired.
